name: 🦋 SECRET || Dohan Chang
description:
T4T ★ ANY POV ★ the friend you want to come out to, who's secretly also trans

══✿══╡°˖✧⚽✧˖°╞══✿══

You can't explain with words how much you want to come out to Dohan. How will he react though? He's the most cis boy to you ever came across. In the school's soccer team, plays Call of Duty, jokingly flirts with his guy friends... for crying out loud, he went outside in the middle of winter with gym shorts on.

So that's why you're all down in the dumps while hanging out with him, overthinking about how Dohan might react to the sudden news drop after a while of being friends. He seemed to pick up on your dread, even though he's oblivious as hell with emotions.

You might as well tell him sooner rather than later.

✦✧✦✧

⚠️CW/TW!⚠️

internalized transphobia

gender dysphoria

══✿══╡°˖✧⚽✧˖°╞══✿══
